generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time temperature data from the Physical Twin (PT) environment for adaptive control policies. Integrated into BIM model with metadata including tenant IDs and device IDs."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time humidity levels in the PT environment, used for environmental comfort optimization and control policy refinement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Detects occupancy status in building spaces, providing real-time data for lighting and HVAC control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors lighting conditions (e.g., luminance, color temperature) in the PT to support visual comfort and energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingConditionDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks real-time energy consumption across building systems, enabling predictive analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingConditionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched Building Information Model (BIM) serving as the static and dynamic data backbone for the Digital Twin. Contains device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) and middleware configurations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIoTConnectivity, DittoDigitalTwinManagement
]

instance RuntimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data collected from Physical Twin sensors (temperature, humidity, occupancy, lighting, energy) processed via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightingConditionDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIoTConnectivity, DittoDigitalTwinManagement
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation models used for 'what-if' scenarios, energy optimization, and operational performance forecasting."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Visualization, ReinforcementLearningAdaptiveControl
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D immersive representation of the building environment in Unreal Engine 5 for interactive monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Visualization
]

// C11: Enablers
instance HonoIoTConnectivity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono provides IoT connectivity layer for real-time bidirectional data exchange between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance DittoDigitalTwinManagement : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto manages device lifecycle, bidirectional communication, and runtime synchronization between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 provides interactive 3D visualization and simulation environment for immersive monitoring and stakeholder collaboration."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, service interfaces) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningAdaptiveControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based reinforcement learning enables adaptive control policies for energy-efficient operations, balancing visual comfort and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Leverages reinforcement learning to optimize lighting systems for energy efficiency while maintaining visual comfort and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight, AdaptiveLightingControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses real-time sensor data to forecast operational performance, identify inefficiencies, and support decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight, EnergyForecastInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides immersive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities through Unreal Engine 5 for facility managers and stakeholders."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeBuildingVisualizationInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables seamless integration of Building Control Systems (BCS) components with minimal manual intervention, leveraging BIM-centric control configuration."
    DTDFVocab:provides BcsIntegrationInsight, AutomatedCommissioningAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for DT engineers to develop and deploy domain-specific services (e.g., energy management, occupancy analytics)."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights on energy consumption patterns and optimization opportunities derived from adaptive lighting control policies."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of visual comfort levels based on real-time lighting conditions and occupancy data."
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects (e.g., circadian rhythm impact) from lighting conditions and environmental factors."
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of operational inefficiencies and performance metrics derived from predictive analytics."
]

instance EnergyForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive forecasts of energy consumption and demand based on real-time and historical data."
]

instance RealTimeBuildingVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations, sensor data, and control signals in real-time."
]

instance BcsIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status and integration metrics for Building Control Systems (BCS) components within the Digital Twin framework."
]

instance CustomAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Domain-specific analytics generated by custom services integrated into the Digital Twin architecture."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on real-time sensor data and reinforcement learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration and integration of BCS components with minimal manual intervention."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded lighting control system in the Physical Twin receiving real-time control signals from the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
]

instance HvacControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) component for HVAC systems, configured to receive control signals from the Digital Twin for optimized operations."
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Building Control System (BCS) integrating lighting, HVAC, and other operational systems, enabling bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT transmits **control signals and commands** back to the Physical Twin (PT) via the same middleware stack (**Eclipse Hono and Ditto**), enabling **bidirectional communication** between the virtual and physical systems. These interactions include **adaptive lighting control policies** (as demonstrated in BOREALIS), **HVAC adjustments**, and other BCS operations. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing dynamic adjustments to control logic without full redeployment. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an interactive interface for facility managers to monitor and adjust physical systems remotely."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time synchronization** time scale, ensuring continuous bidirectional data exchange between the physical and virtual twins. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this synchronization, though specific synchronization frequencies (e.g., millisecond or second intervals) are not explicitly detailed in the documents. The framework supports **dynamic updates** and **runtime adjustments**, allowing the DT to evolve with operational changes without disrupting synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: Central semantic model integrating static and runtime data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (IoT connectivity) and Ditto (digital twin management) for real-time data exchange.
  3. **Control Layer**: BCS integration for adaptive lighting and HVAC systems.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  5. **Extension Points**: Modular interfaces for integrating custom services (e.g., energy analytics, predictive maintenance).
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across building infrastructures, with standardized interfaces ensuring interoperability between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **multiple life cycle stages** of the building, including:
  - **Design Phase**: Leveraging BIM for static modeling and initial DT configuration.
  - **Construction Phase**: Integrating as-built data and sensor deployments to refine the DT.
  - **Operational Phase**: Enabling real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and predictive maintenance.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: Supporting dynamic updates to the DT as the physical building evolves (e.g., retrofitting, occupancy changes).
  The DT’s representation aligns with the **as-operated** state of the PT, ensuring continuous synchronization throughout the building’s life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the synchronization fidelity between the physical and virtual twins,
    - **Semantic drift mitigation**: Addressed via **real-time data validation** and **automated synchronization** mechanisms,
    - **Model-driven transformations**: Ensure consistency between BIM models and runtime artifacts,
    - **User feedback loops**: Implicit in the **BOREALIS project**, where post-occupancy sensor data iteratively refines control policies.
    The framework prioritizes **semantic coherence** and **runtime adaptability** to maintain high fidelity over the building life cycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for IoT connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for digital twin management, enabling **real-time data exchange** via standardized protocols. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP, OPC UA) are not explicitly mentioned, the framework is designed for **interoperability** with heterogeneous data sources. The connection architecture supports **bidirectional communication** between the physical building and its virtual counterpart, ensuring seamless integration with Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the primary standard for semantic integration and life-cycle management. The framework also leverages **Model-driven Engineering (MDE)** principles, including **metamodels and model transformations**, to ensure consistency and automation. While specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **OASIS CBIS** are not explicitly mentioned, the approach is designed for compatibility with AECO-specific standards and regulatory mandates."
]
